name: How to File for Comp When Your Illness Developed Over Years
description: How to File for Comp When Your Illness Developed Over Years - Murray

step.name: Step 1
step.text: If you've been diagnosed with a work-related illness, start by notifying your supervisor in writing immediately. Next, seek a medical evaluation from a doctor who understands industrial exposure. Document every chemical or environment you were exposed to daily. Finally, track all your out-of-pocket medical costs. If the paperwork gets overwhelming, a legal expert can take the lead for you.
